correction: Corrupted Blood (applied by the Corrupting Cry support) is a STACKING PHYSICAL damage-over-time debuff. It is NOT a Bleed and is NOT affected by Bleed-specific modifiers (e.g. 'increased Bleeding damage', faster bleeding, bleed on hit). It scales with modifiers to Physical damage, to Damage Over Time, to generic/area damage where applicable, with warcry effectiveness/exerted attacks that apply more stacks, and with the number of stacks applied. Never recommend Bleed-specific scaling for Corrupted Blood.
